fields.value: Cu addition to Fe-28Mn-10Al-1C steel increases the lattice parameter of austenitic matrix (from 0.3687 nm to 0.3689 nm), which promotes precipitation of κ-carbide.
fields.reason: b0048明确给出Cu添加增大晶格参数并促进κ-碳化物析出

fields.value: The precipitation of κ-carbide expelled Cu atoms, locally increasing Cu concentration in surrounding matrix; upon reaching critical concentration, Cu clusters form and precipitate as Cu-rich phase.
fields.reason: b0047详细描述Cu原子被排出、浓度升高并形成Cu析出的过程

fields.value: The critical lattice parameter of austenitic matrix for κ-carbide precipitation is approximately a = 0.3670 nm; below this, κ-carbide cannot precipitate. The calculation suggests a composition boundary formula exists for intragranular κ-carbide precipitation in Fe-Mn-Al-C steels.
fields.reason: b0048明确给出临界晶格常数0.3670 nm及成分边界公式

fields.value: The paper mentions that the yield strength of Fe-Mn-Al-C austenitic low-density steel is only 360-540 MPa (from reference), motivating Cu addition to improve strength, but no experimental mechanical testing results are reported in the current study.
fields.reason: b0015引述屈服强度360-540 MPa并说明添加Cu的动机

fields.value: Lattice misfit values: γ/κ: 2.3%, γ/Cu-rich: 1.0%, κ/Cu-rich: 3.4%. All below 5%, confirming coherent interfaces.
fields.reason: 证据给出具体misfit值并判断共格

fields.value: κ-carbide precipitates first from austenitic matrix. Cu atoms are rejected from κ-carbide, enriching the surrounding matrix. When Cu concentration reaches critical level, Cu clusters form and precipitate as Cu-rich phase. Cu-rich phase nucleates in austenitic matrix near κ-carbide due to lower misfit with matrix (1.0%) compared to with κ-carbide (3.4%). The presence of κ-carbide promotes Cu-rich phase precipitation. Addition of Cu increases austenite lattice parameter, promoting κ-carbide precipitation.
fields.reason: 证据详细描述了析出顺序和Cu的作用

fields.value: κ-carbide regions are enriched in Fe, Mn, Al, and depleted in Cu. Cu-rich phase regions are enriched in Cu and depleted in Fe, Mn, Al. This indicates Cu partitioning to the matrix surrounding κ-carbide, leading to Cu-rich clustering and precipitation.

fields.value: Misfit between γ/κ: 2.3% (a0=0.3689 nm, a1=0.3775 nm); γ/Cu-rich: 1.0% (a0=0.3689 nm, a1=0.3652 nm); κ/Cu-rich: 3.4% (a0=0.3775 nm, a1=0.3652 nm). All < 5%, indicating coherent interfaces. Low misfit of Cu-rich with matrix promotes nucleation in matrix rather than on κ-carbide.
fields.reason: 证据包含所有misfit值和结论
